TaskDescription: Accuracy (ACC) per trial: correct / incorrect / n/a. (OLMM project)

onset.Description: Reconstructed trial onset in seconds from the start of the run, computed as the cumulative sum of preceding trial durations. No raw timestamp column is available in df5.csv.

duration.Description: Reaction time in seconds (stimulus onset to button press).

accuracy.Description: Response accuracy derived from signal_detection_theory column. 'hit' and 'correct rejection' → correct; 'miss' and 'false alarm' → incorrect; 'late' → n/a.

learning_stage.Description: Learning stage identifier derived from 'stage' column (LS1–LS4).

signal_detection_theory.Description: Signal detection theory label: hit, miss, false alarm, correct rejection, or late.
